properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 76/18

NORWEGIAN SEA NATO WILL CONDUCT A NAVAL EXERCISE WITH SURFACE, SUBSURFACE AND AIR FROM JUNE 25TH TO JULY 6TH.
THE EXERCISE WILL BE CONDUCTED IN AN AREA BOUND BY THE FOLLOWING COORDINATES:
67-25N 006-25E

67-25N 012-40E
69-20N 015-05E
70-10N 012-40E
70-55N 012-40E
70-55N 006-25E
UNITS CONDUCTING UNDERWATER ACTIVITY IN THE AREA DESCRIBED ABOVE ARE REQUESTED TO CONTACT THE COASTAL SURVEILLANCE CENTER AT THE NORWEGIAN NATIONAL JOINT HEADQUARTERS (NOR NJHQ) IN ORDER TO DE-CONFLICT AND MAINTAIN SAFETY AT ALL TIMES.
COASTAL SURVEILLANCE CENTER AT NOR NJHQ, TEL +47 7553 6298, E-MAIL: CSC@COSS.MIL.NO
